stemHtml: Considering the methods of loading cargo, which of the following answers is correct?

options.a: Bulk cargo is secured onto unit load devices using nets.
options.b: Pallets are used on smaller aircraft and must be strapped down to tie-down points.
options.c: Compared to pallets, bulk cargo is quicker to load and requires fewer ground personnel.
options.d: Containers lock directly into the aircraft’s restraint system and have their own manifest.
